response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and demonstrated leadership in open-source and cross-platform development, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks — key requirements for this Staff GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring initiatives
Strong background in building scalable data systems and real-time infrastructure with high-performance languages
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or GenAI production deployments in 8+ years of experience
AI-related work is limited to vague references to 'AI-agent infrastructure' without technical depth or outcomes
Lacks demonstrated experience with LLM evaluation, observability, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
